title: barista verify — structured output (stub)
description: Stub schema for the planned `barista verify` command. Reserves the document shape so consumers can begin coding against the discriminator and status enum ahead of the feature landing. stub — see PRD §9 / M5.x for implementation.

command.description: Discriminator. Always the literal string `verify` for documents produced by `barista verify`.

status.description: Overall verification result. `not-yet-implemented` is emitted while the command is a stub; once shipped it will only emit `ok` or `failed`.

details.description: Per-check details. Shape of array items is intentionally unconstrained for the stub; v2 of this schema will tighten it once the verification model is finalized.
